purpose: S5 (supplement 20260522) trial ledger. Audit O1: portfolio_acceptance.py hardcoded DSR n_trials=5; the true number of distinct model/config variations examined to land on the promoted rank-to-portfolio path (path D) was understated, so DSR under-deflated. This ledger is the persisted, honest enumeration of those trials; DSR n_trials = len(trials).

trials.desc: cycle06 equal-weight zscore composite — non-ML baseline reference
Linear rank model — examined in rank walk-forward, not promoted
XGBRanker objective rank:ndcg — the promoted ranker
LightGBM lambdarank parity model — examined, not promoted

n_trials_note: 10 distinct configs. Adding a config that informed the path-D selection (a new model family / objective / mapping / risk overlay actually run) MUST append a trial here so DSR keeps deflating honestly.
